017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml;
018
019import java.io.*;
020import java.net.*;
021import java.net.http.*;
022import java.nio.file.*;
023import java.time.*;
024
025import javax.xml.parsers.*;
026
027import org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.*;
028import org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.impl.*;
029import org.w3c.dom.*;
030
031import net.shibboleth.shared.component.*;
032import net.shibboleth.shared.resolver.*;
033import net.shibboleth.shared.xml.impl.*;
034
035/**
036 * Convenience factories for building {@link MetadataResolver} instances backed by an OpenSAML implementation.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * Juneau ships <i>convenience factories only</i> &mdash; no bundled default
040 * {@link MetadataResolver} singleton.  Applications either:
041 * <ul>
042 *    <li>Call {@link #file(File)} for a local SAML metadata file (typical dev/staging setup).
043 *    <li>Call {@link #url(String)} for a remote {@code /metadata} endpoint (typical production setup).
044 *    <li>Build their own {@link MetadataResolver} directly using OpenSAML APIs (advanced).
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <p>
048 * Both factories return resolvers that are <b>already initialized</b> &mdash; ready to hand to
049 * {@link SamlAssertionValidator.Builder#metadataResolver(MetadataResolver)} immediately.
050 *
051 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5>
052 * <p>
053 * The URL factory uses the JDK {@link HttpClient} (Java 17) to fetch the metadata blob once at construction
054 * time and wraps the parsed DOM in a {@link DOMMetadataResolver}.  No background refresh is performed; applications
055 * that need periodic refresh should construct their own {@code HTTPMetadataResolver} (from
056 * {@code opensaml-saml-impl}) with an Apache HttpClient + refresh policy.
057 *
058 * @since 10.0.0
059 */
060public final class SamlMetadataResolvers {
061
062   private SamlMetadataResolvers() {}
063
064   /**
065    * Creates a {@link MetadataResolver} that loads SAML 2.0 metadata from the given file.
066    *
067    * <p>
068    * The file is parsed at construction time and re-parsed on disk modification by the underlying
069    * {@link FilesystemMetadataResolver}.
070    *
071    * @param file The metadata XML file on the local filesystem.  Must exist and be readable.
072    * @return An initialized {@link MetadataResolver}.
073    * @throws IOException If the file cannot be parsed or initialized.
074    */
075   public static MetadataResolver file(File file) throws IOException {
076      if (file == null)
077         throw new IllegalArgumentException("file must not be null");
078      if (!file.isFile()) // HTT: false branch (file present) requires valid SAML metadata XML; covered by integration tests
079         throw new FileNotFoundException("SAML metadata file not found: " + file);
080
081      OpenSamlBootstrap.ensureInitialized();
082      try {
083         var parserPool = new BasicParserPool();
084         parserPool.initialize();
085
086         var resolver = new FilesystemMetadataResolver(file);
087         resolver.setId(file.getAbsolutePath());
088         resolver.setParserPool(parserPool);
089         resolver.setRequireValidMetadata(true);
090         resolver.initialize();
091         return resolver;
092      } catch (ComponentInitializationException | ResolverException e) {
093         throw new IOException("Failed to initialize FilesystemMetadataResolver for " + file, e);
094      }
095   }
096
097   /**
098    * Creates a {@link MetadataResolver} that fetches SAML 2.0 metadata from the given URL once and serves it
099    * from an in-memory DOM.
100    *
101    * <p>
102    * Fetch happens on the calling thread with a 30-second connect/request timeout.  Applications that need
103    * periodic refresh should construct an OpenSAML {@code HTTPMetadataResolver} directly with an Apache
104    * HttpClient.
105    *
106    * @param url The metadata URL.  Must be an absolute HTTPS or HTTP URL.
107    * @return An initialized {@link MetadataResolver}.
108    * @throws IOException If the URL cannot be fetched or the metadata is malformed.
109    */
110   public static MetadataResolver url(String url) throws IOException {
111      if (url == null)
112         throw new IllegalArgumentException("url must not be null");
113
114      OpenSamlBootstrap.ensureInitialized();
115      try {
116         var client = HttpClient.newBuilder()
117            .connectTimeout(Duration.ofSeconds(30))
118            .build();
119         var req = HttpRequest.newBuilder()
120            .uri(URI.create(url))
121            .timeout(Duration.ofSeconds(30))
122            .GET()
123            .build();
124         var resp = client.send(req, HttpResponse.BodyHandlers.ofByteArray());
125         if (resp.statusCode() < 200 || resp.statusCode() >= 300) // HTT: false branch (2xx success) requires live SAML metadata endpoint; covered by integration tests
126            throw new IOException("Failed to fetch SAML metadata from " + url + " (HTTP " + resp.statusCode() + ")");
127
128         var dbf = DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance();
129         dbf.setNamespaceAware(true);
130         dbf.setFeature("http://apache.org/xml/features/disallow-doctype-decl", true);
131         dbf.setFeature("http://xml.org/sax/features/external-general-entities", false);
132         dbf.setFeature("http://xml.org/sax/features/external-parameter-entities", false);
133         dbf.setXIncludeAware(false);
134         dbf.setExpandEntityReferences(false);
135         var doc = dbf.newDocumentBuilder().parse(new ByteArrayInputStream(resp.body()));
136         Element root = doc.getDocumentElement();
137
138         var resolver = new DOMMetadataResolver(root);
139         resolver.setId(url);
140         resolver.setRequireValidMetadata(true);
141         resolver.initialize();
142         return resolver;
143      } catch (InterruptedException e) {
144         Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
145         throw new IOException("Interrupted while fetching SAML metadata from " + url, e);
146      } catch (ComponentInitializationException | javax.xml.parsers.ParserConfigurationException
147            | org.xml.sax.SAXException e) {
148         throw new IOException("Failed to initialize DOMMetadataResolver for " + url, e);
149      }
150   }
151
152   /**
153    * Creates a {@link MetadataResolver} that loads SAML 2.0 metadata from the given {@link Path}.
154    *
155    * <p>
156    * Convenience overload of {@link #file(File)}; useful for callers that have a {@link Path} on hand.
157    *
158    * @param path The metadata XML file as a {@link Path}.
159    * @return An initialized {@link MetadataResolver}.
160    * @throws IOException If the file cannot be parsed or initialized.
161    */
162   public static MetadataResolver file(Path path) throws IOException {
163      if (path == null) // HTT: false branch (valid path) delegates to file(File); covered wherever file(File) is tested
164         throw new IllegalArgumentException("path must not be null");
165      return file(path.toFile());
166   }
167}
